creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
There is a security update for quagga that fixes a number of bugs and vulnerabilities.
http://www.cert.fi/en/reports/2011/vulnerability539178.html
(CVE-2011-3323, CVE-2011-3324, CVE-2011-3325, CVE-2011-3326 and CVE-2011-3327).

Fix: http://www.quagga.net/download/quagga-0.99.20.tar.gz has been released.

SIZE (quagga-0.99.20.tar.gz) = 2232051
SHA256 (quagga-0.99.20.tar.gz) = b7a98cc6b022bb0cb405557b3d920cf513150f64384dbd0a2248b5bd248df58b


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: install the existing port
